title: Embedding Policy (embedding-policy v1.0)
description: Standardized configuration contract for semantic re-ranking and embeddings.

model_name.description: The name of the embedding model (e.g., text-embedding-3-small, all-MiniLM-L6-v2).

dimensions.description: The vector dimensionality produced by the model.

provider.description: Indicates whether the model runs locally or via an external API.

similarity_metric.description: The distance metric used to compare vectors.

fallback_behavior.description: Behavior if semantic re-ranking fails (e.g., fallback to raw BM25). Note: The JSON Schema "default" keyword is informational only. Runtime consumers MUST apply the default explicitly if the field is omitted.

max_tokens.description: Optional token limit for the model context window.
